# Frontend Component Update Template

```markdown
## Current State
> What component/pattern exists today and where it's used

**Current Component:** [Name of existing component, e.g., "Legacy Calendar Picker"]

**Current Implementation:** [Brief description of what exists today]

**Locations Using This Component:**
- [App section/page 1]
- [App section/page 2]
- [App section/page 3]

## Replacement Component
> Descripton of the component/pattern that will replace it

**New Component:** [Name of new component, e.g., "Updated Calendar Picker from Design System"]

**Key Improvements:**
- [Improvement 1]
- [Improvement 2]
- [Improvement 3]

**Changes in Behavior:**
- [Any intentional behavior changes from old to new component]

## Visual/UX Changes
> Notable differences in appearance or interaction patterns

- [Visual change 1]
- [Interaction pattern change 1]
- [Responsive behavior changes]

**Design Reference:** [Link to Figma component or design system documentation]

## Scope of Replacement

### In Scope
> Specific locations where replacement should occur
- [ ] [Specific page/feature 1]
- [ ] [Specific page/feature 2]
- [ ] [Specific page/feature 3]

### Out of Scope
> Locations explicitly NOT being updated in this phase
- [Location 1 - with reason if helpful]
- [Location 2 - with reason if helpful]

## Functional Requirements
> Any behavior that must be preserved or changed

**Must Preserve:**
- [Behavior/functionality that cannot change]
- [Another preserved behavior]

## Stakeholders
-

## Additional Context
> Links to related work, dependencies, or background info
```
